primary_source: Mayer, M. G. (1949). On Closed Shells in Nuclei. Physical Review, 75(12), 1969-1970. DOI: 10.1103/PhysRev.75.1969.
note: a=50 is coprime to 3 (50 mod 3=2). 24 routes, all Cosmos. Note that 24 equals the Cosmos cycle length — the total route count coincidentally matches the Cosmos period for this value.
